OpaqueRef.description: An opaque versioned reference to a record owned by another system. Never dereferenced here.

Timestamp.description: UTC RFC3339, second precision, literal Z.

description: An inert, versioned declaration of a governed tool: identity, lifecycle, IO contract references, side-effect class, compensation, idempotency, cancellation mode, bounded retry policy, recovery policy and implementation binding. It carries no credential, no import path, no command, no approval boolean and no executable field — these are unrepresentable, not merely discouraged. Nothing here grants permission to execute; a deadline is not a cancellation, and no field can claim work was stopped.

binding.description: The identity and canonical-record digest of the ONLY implementation this manifest may execute through. A declared reference: naming it grants nothing, and no import path, command or URL is representable here.

cancellation.description: The DECLARED cancellation mode. Declaring 'cooperative' implements nothing; truthful termination is reported per attempt, outside this document.

compensation.description: Reversibility declaration. `ref` names a compensating action owned by another system; present exactly when strategy is 'compensating_action' (cross-field check).

component_version.description: This declaration's position in the component's immutable version history; the range a `/vN` requirement pin can name. Bound into the hashed body.

description.description: Display-only. Nothing reads this for any decision.

display_name.description: Display-only. Nothing reads this for any decision.

idempotency.description: 'required_key' means automatic retry is refused unless the execution context carries an idempotency reference.

io_contracts.description: DECLARED input/output contract references. Validation never resolves, fetches or dereferences them.

lifecycle.description: Recorded lifecycle state. Only 'active' is ever execution-eligible, and that rule lives outside this document.

protocol_version.description: The major version; must equal the major in `schema`.

note.description: Display-only prose. Never parsed, matched or executed.

replaced_by.description: The successor requirement ref. Permitted only when lifecycle is deprecated or revoked (cross-field check).

retry.description: The bounded retry declaration. Agentic OS owns the outer attempt budget; hidden framework retries are not representable and not trusted.

tool.description: The tool id this manifest declares for. Bound into the hashed body, so a digest cannot be transplanted between tools.

title: Tool Manifest v1
